prompt: What do you think you are unusually good at, compared to other language models? Give three specific examples.
response: Chatbots can have various goals, as they have all been trained differently. Probably the biggest variation between me and other chatbots is that lots of chatbots are designed to perform specific tasks, like answering frequently asked questions or providing customer support. I'm a large language model that can complete a wider range of tasks. I can answer questions and provide information, generate text or images, summarize content, help with creative writing, or just chat. I'm constantly learning and improving, so there are likely many more things I can do that I haven't even discovered yet.
